task_completion.description: Open the chinook database in LibreOffice Base
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base application window is open, showing 'chinook.odb' in the title bar or recent files list.

task_completion.description: Open the Customer table for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table data view window is open showing the 'Customer' table, with columns such as CustomerId, FirstName, and LastName.

task_completion.description: Locate the record for Customer #17 (Jack Smith)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The row for CustomerId 17 (FirstName: Jack, LastName: Smith) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Update the Address, City, State, and PostalCode fields for Customer #17
task_completion.visual_evidence: The row for Customer 17 shows Address as '4200 Lake Shore Drive', City as 'Chicago', State as 'IL', and PostalCode as '60613'.

task_completion.description: Update the Phone field for Customer #17
task_completion.visual_evidence: The row for Customer 17 shows Phone as '+1 (312) 555-0198'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the database
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save icon (floppy disk) is clicked, the record selector indicates the row is saved (no pencil icon next to the row), or the main LibreOffice Base window shows the database is saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to make changes, not terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Base graphical interface, not a terminal window executing SQL UPDATE commands or sqlite3 scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with LibreOffice Base, not a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window has standard LibreOffice Base menus, toolbars, and table data views, rather than a raw text editor opening the .odb file.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter other fields for Customer #17
integrity.visual_evidence: The row for Customer 17 still shows FirstName 'Jack', LastName 'Smith', and Email 'jacksmith@microsoft.com'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target database is located at '/home/ga/chinook.odb'. Customer ID 17 is Jack Smith. The expected updated values for Customer 17 are: Address='4200 Lake Shore Drive', City='Chicago', State='IL', PostalCode='60613', Phone='+1 (312) 555-0198'. Preserved values that should NOT change: FirstName='Jack', LastName='Smith', Email='jacksmith@microsoft.com'.
